sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110761" key="fqu/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φθύζω</orth>, only in compd. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπιφθύζω</foreign> (q.v.). <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φιν</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">σφιν</itype>, <sense id="n110761.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σφεῖς.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
